'''Ruul''' was a moon of [[Sriluur/Legends|Sriluur]] which belonged to the [[Bulq family]]. A lush world of tropical gardens, it was the birthworld of [[Sora Bulq/Legends|Sora Bulq]] and the site of the [[Bulq estate]].

==History==
Bulq invited several dissident [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] to the moon in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], ostensibly to discuss their opposition to Jedi involvement in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. The truth was that Bulq had fallen to the dark side and now served [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]]. The meeting was a trap designed to set the dissidents against the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], but [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] exposed his manipulations and the plot failed.

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|I am Major Brenn Tantor. Perhaps you have heard of my recent success against the Rebellion on Sriluur's moon, Ruul?|Major Tantor|<ref name="SWG:ED">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=event|Empire Day}}</ref>}}
The Imperial [[assault on Ruul]] was mentioned by Brenn Tantor in the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''. However, the game confused the planet [[Ruul (planet)|Ruul]] with Sriluur's moon of Ruul.<ref name="SWG:ED" />
